options.content:
# Revenue KPIs
Total revenue, trends by method/vehicle/city, platform commission, and per-user metrics

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'OK' AS connection, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rides)::text AS rides, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driver_earnings)::text AS earnings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID')::text AS paid_rides

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM("totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS total_paid_rides, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG("totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_fare FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID'

SELECT m.method AS payment_method, COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::double precision AS total_revenue FROM (VALUES ('CASH'), ('CARD'), ('UPI'), ('WALLET')) AS m(method) LEFT JOIN rides r ON r."paymentMethod"::text = m.method AND r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY m.method ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(SPLIT_PART(r."pickupAddress", ',', 2)), ''), 'Unknown') AS city, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS completed_rides, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_fare, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(r."totalFare")) OVER (), 0), 2) AS revenue_pct FROM rides r WHERE r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(SPLIT_PART(r."pickupAddress", ',', 2)), ''), 'Unknown') ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT COALESCE(d."vehicleType", 'Unknown') AS vehicle_type, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS completed_rides, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_fare, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r.distance), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_distance_km FROM rides r LEFT JOIN drivers d ON r."driverId" = d.id WHERE r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY COALESCE(d."vehicleType", 'Unknown') ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', "completedAt") AS time, COALESCE(SUM("totalFare"), 0)::double precision AS daily_revenue FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' AND "completedAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND "completedAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', "completedAt") ORDER BY time

SELECT month, ROUND(COALESCE(monthly_revenue, 0)::numeric, 2) AS monthly_revenue, completed_rides, ROUND(COALESCE(avg_fare, 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_fare, ROUND(COALESCE(prev_month_revenue, 0)::numeric, 2) AS prev_month, COALESCE(mom_growth_pct, 0) AS mom_growth_pct FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt") AS month, SUM("totalFare") AS monthly_revenue, COUNT(*) AS completed_rides, AVG("totalFare") AS avg_fare, LAG(SUM("totalFare")) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt")) AS prev_month_revenue, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM("totalFare") - LAG(SUM("totalFare")) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt"))) / NULLIF(LAG(SUM("totalFare")) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt")), 0), 2) AS mom_growth_pct FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "completedAt")) x UNION ALL SELECT NULL, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' LIMIT 1) ORDER BY month DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(SPLIT_PART(r."pickupAddress", ',', 2)), ''), 'Unknown') AS city, DATE_TRUNC('month', r."completedAt") AS month, ROUND(SUM(r."totalFare")::numeric, 2) AS monthly_revenue, COUNT(*) AS completed_rides FROM rides r WHERE r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(SPLIT_PART(r."pickupAddress", ',', 2)), ''), 'Unknown'), DATE_TRUNC('month', r."completedAt") ORDER BY city, month DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT CASE WHEN "surgeMultiplier" = 1.0 THEN 'No Surge' WHEN "surgeMultiplier" < 1.5 THEN 'Low (1.0-1.5x)' WHEN "surgeMultiplier" < 2.0 THEN 'Medium (1.5-2.0x)' ELSE 'High (2.0x+)' END AS surge_category, COUNT(*) AS ride_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM("totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM("surgeFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_surge_revenue, ROUND(AVG("surgeMultiplier"), 2) AS avg_multiplier FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY CASE WHEN "surgeMultiplier" = 1.0 THEN 'No Surge' WHEN "surgeMultiplier" < 1.5 THEN 'Low (1.0-1.5x)' WHEN "surgeMultiplier" < 2.0 THEN 'Medium (1.5-2.0x)' ELSE 'High (2.0x+)' END ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(commission), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_commission, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM("netAmount"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_driver_earnings, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_ride_fares, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG("commissionRate"), 0) * 100, 2) AS avg_commission_rate_pct FROM driver_earnings

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r."passengerId") AS paying_users, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r."totalFare"), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT r."passengerId"), 0), 2) AS revenue_per_user, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ur.cnt), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_rides_per_user FROM rides r JOIN (SELECT "passengerId", COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM rides WHERE status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' GROUP BY "passengerId") ur ON r."passengerId" = ur."passengerId" WHERE r.status = 'RIDE_COMPLETED' AND r."paymentStatus" = 'PAID'
